content.p: Apart from ranking and selecting best car offers, there is one more way to look for the best opportunities. All items stored in the table can be easily viewed on a dashboard which allows you to plot data in many different ways. You can just load data from a database and check the distributions of all key features. It's even possible to choose a car of interest from a scatterplot and get a link to the auction on otomoto.pl. Below there are a few screenshots which illustrate usage of the dashboard.

img: Filters which can be used to refine your search
Single boxplot – year of production vs. price
